info.title: Belle Mare Tours API
info.description: API-first backend for Belle Mare Tours — catalogue, availability, bookings, payments and the AI assistant. The same token-authenticated API serves web and mobile clients.

tags.name: Transfers
tags.description: Airport & hotel transfer hotels, areas and fare quotes

tags.name: Account
tags.description: Profile, privacy export and account deletion

get.summary: Search the published tour & transport catalogue
Get full activity detail by slug
Price/duration slider bounds for the current catalogue scope
List bookable occurrences with live seats_left

post.summary: Submit/update the caller’s review for an activity (booking-gated)

403.description: No confirmed booking for this activity

post.summary: Submit a review via a one-time invite token (no login required)

409.description: This review link is no longer valid — it may have already been used or expired

get.summary: The active browse categories
The caller’s own reviews ("My reviews"), newest first
Live fetch of the business's own Google reviews (staff-only)

503.description: Google Maps API key is not configured

get.summary: The caller’s profile (created if missing)
The caller’s GDPR data export (profile + bookings)

post.summary: Permanently delete the caller’s account (data + auth user)

get.summary: Typeahead over the bookable airport-transfer hotels
Curated point-to-point areas with region + airport zone
Read-only fare estimate (equals the booked charge for the same inputs)

post.summary: Reserve the spot for a date (anonymous-friendly); reused at pay so no double-hold

get.summary: Get a hold's current lifecycle status (owner-scoped, for cart reconciliation)

post.summary: Release a hold the caller owns (the cart calls this when a held line is removed)

get.summary: List the signed-in user’s booking history ("My Trips"), newest first

post.summary: Create a payment_pending booking (prices come from the DB)

get.summary: List the signed-in user’s payment_pending bookings (for the cart)
Get booking status by reference
Download the booking’s invoice/receipt PDF (owner-or-staff, once paid)

409.description: Invoice not available until the booking is paid

get.summary: Download the airport-transfer e-voucher PDF (owner-or-staff, transfers only, once confirmed)

409.description: Not a transfer, or not available until the booking is confirmed

post.summary: Customer cancels their own confirmed + paid booking (>24h before the trip) and starts a refund

409.description: Outside the free-cancellation window, or not cancellable

post.summary: Customer moves their own confirmed + paid booking to another date on the same option

409.description: Outside the free-change window, a different option, sold out, or not reschedulable

post.summary: Create a payment + hosted-checkout link for a booking
Confirm a booking from the provider's authoritative checkout status

get.summary: List the signed-in user’s saved activities (full TourSummary cards), newest first

post.summary: Save an activity to the wishlist by slug (idempotent)

delete.summary: Remove a saved activity by slug (idempotent)

get.summary: List the signed-in user’s notifications, newest first

post.summary: Mark all of the caller’s notifications as read

get.summary: The caller’s unread-notification count (bell badge)

post.summary: Receive a browser-side error report (telemetry; per-IP rate limited)

get.summary: The OpenAPI 3.1 specification for this API
Liveness/readiness probe (add ?deep=true to also ping the database)

503.description: One or more health checks failed

bearerAuth.description: Supabase access token (JWT) from the Authorization header.
